basic_details.job_title: CUSB CRS Project Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Central University of South Bihar (CUSB) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 CRS Project Fellow (Junior) I/II Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 09-06-2026.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 21 days from the date of Notification (09 June 2026)

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Physics with minimum 55% marks (not earlier than 3 years)
qualification.details: CRS Project Fellow (Junior)-I: M.Sc. (not earlier than 3 years) with a minimum of 55% marks in Physics. CRS Project Fellow (Junior)-II: M.Sc. (not earlier than 3 years) with a minimum of 55% marks in Physics with valid JEST/GATE/NET-JRF/Lectureship/UGC-CSIR NET JRF/Lectureship.

vacancy_details.Post Name: CRS Project Fellow (Junior)-I / CRS Project Fellow (Junior)-II

salary_details.details: CRS Project Fellow (Junior)-I: ₹14,000 pm + HRA @ 10% CRS Project Fellow (Junior)-II: ₹31,000 pm + HRA @ 10%

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CUSB Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
